step_by_step_thinking:

According to various studies referenced here, surgical site infections related to clean-contaminated wounds tend to fall somewhere below the 20%-30% mark but above just 1-2%. Studies suggest typical ranges closer to approximately 5-10%.
Therefore, my answer would align closest to option B: <10%
